creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
To clarify why I'm confused, during 10.2 testing (all BETA, RC, and final RELEASE builds) I tested that:

1) pkg(8) was able to install packages from the upstream mirrors;
2) pkg(8) was able to install packages provided on the DVD as documented in the 10.2-RELEASE errata page.

In all cases, for all builds, I did not have any problems with any installation menthod.
